scripts.build: node scripts/csp-hash.mjs && vite build && node scripts/prerender-routes.mjs
scripts.sb:deploy: supabase functions deploy create-checkout && supabase functions deploy create-portal-session && supabase functions deploy subscription-action && supabase functions deploy list-payments && supabase functions deploy dodo-webhook --no-verify-jwt
scripts.android:debug: cap sync android && cd android && set TEMP=C:\gradle-tmp&& set TMP=C:\gradle-tmp&& gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: cap sync android && cd android && set TEMP=C:\gradle-tmp&& set TMP=C:\gradle-tmp&& gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: cap sync android && cd android && set TEMP=C:\gradle-tmp&& set TMP=C:\gradle-tmp&& gradlew.bat bundleRelease
